executive_summary.risk_assessment: Grade B - Critical vulnerabilities in non-application code (orchestrator) and application code (handlebars). Require immediate attention but do not block deployment if orchestrator is isolated from user traffic.

source_frontend.note: All moderate vulnerabilities are dev-time only (vite, vitest, esbuild)

supply_chain.risk_assessment: HIGH - Significant attack surface, recommend supply chain monitoring

critical_findings.title: protobufjs Arbitrary Code Execution (Platform Orchestrator)
critical_findings.impact: Arbitrary code execution in protobufjs. This is in the orchestrator infrastructure that runs the entire build pipeline.
critical_findings.exploitability: High - known CVE with public POC likely available
critical_findings.escalation: SOLO-SESSION REQUIRED - platform/ infrastructure cannot be modified by pipeline agents
critical_findings.reason_blocked: platform/ is critical infrastructure, requires solo session per CLAUDE.md

critical_findings.title: Handlebars.js Multiple JavaScript Injection Vulnerabilities
critical_findings.impact: Multiple JavaScript injection vulnerabilities in template engine. Could allow template injection attacks if templates are derived from user input.
critical_findings.exploitability: High if templates are user-editable (workflow definitions)
critical_findings.investigation_required: Verify if handlebars is directly used or transitive. Check if templates are derived from user input.

high_severity_findings.title: path-to-regexp Regular Expression Denial of Service
high_severity_findings.impact: ReDoS vulnerability in path matching. Attacker can craft route parameters to trigger catastrophic backtracking, causing DoS.
high_severity_findings.exploitability: High if orchestrator routes are exposed to untrusted input
high_severity_findings.cross_ref: red-teamer - Recommend rate limiting on API routes

moderate_findings.title: Vite Path Traversal in Optimized Deps
moderate_findings.production_risk: Low - unless sourcemaps are served in production
moderate_findings.notes: Major version bump for vitest, may require API updates in tests

moderate_findings.title: vitest/esbuild Cascading Dev-Time Vulnerabilities
moderate_findings.production_risk: None - dev server and test runner

moderate_findings.title: brace-expansion Memory Exhaustion
moderate_findings.impact: Zero-step sequence causes process hang and memory exhaustion. Only triggered with malformed input.

outdated_packages.recommendation: Consider upgrade for performance improvements, but major version bump requires evaluation
Plan React 19 migration for future sprint, significant effort
Required to fix dev-time vulnerabilities (DEP-004, DEP-005). High priority.
Update as part of DEP-003 remediation

license_compliance.details: All direct dependencies use permissive licenses (MIT, ISC, Apache 2.0). No GPL/AGPL detected.
license_compliance.transitive_check: Not performed - recommend adding license-checker to CI/CD

supply_chain_assessment.rationale: 799 total dependencies (61:1 transitive-to-direct ratio) across all modules. Single compromise in transitive dependency affects entire build pipeline and application.
recommendations: Monitor npm trends for packages with <100 weekly downloads
Implement GitHub Dependabot or equivalent for proactive CVE alerting
Quarterly review of dependency age (flag packages not updated in 6+ months)
Run npm audit in CI/CD, fail on critical/high in direct dependencies

remediation_backlog.description: Update protobufjs to >=7.5.5 to fix arbitrary code execution vulnerability in orchestrator infrastructure.
Update handlebars to >=4.7.9 to fix multiple JavaScript injection CVEs. Investigate if handlebars is processing user-defined templates (workflow definitions).
Update path-to-regexp to >=0.1.13 to fix Regular Expression Denial of Service vulnerability in API routing.

remediation_backlog.ticket_title: Update frontend dev dependencies (vitest 4.1.4, vite 8.0.9, esbuild)
remediation_backlog.description: Update vitest to 4.1.4 which pulls in fixed vite and esbuild. Fixes path traversal and CORS bypass vulnerabilities in dev server/test runner. Requires testing for API changes.
remediation_backlog.notes: Major version bump, API changes likely

remediation_backlog.description: Patch updates for security and stability: express 4.22.1+, pino 8.21.0+, brace-expansion 1.1.13+. Plan pino 8→10 migration for future.

remediation_backlog.ticket_title: [INFRASTRUCTURE] Add npm audit and license-checker to CI/CD
remediation_backlog.description: Integrate npm audit and license-checker into build pipeline. Fail on critical/high CVEs in direct dependencies.
